Sponsorships / ROCCAT

ROCCAT

peripherals
Sponsorship and Affiliate
Commission Varies
affiliate; sponsorship
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

ROCCAT is a gaming company specializing in high-quality hardware. Keyboards, mice, headsets, and other accessories necessary for gamers.

Team ROCCAT

ROCCAT’s mission is to deliver high-performance gaming equipment for all PC gamers. Feel the power, response, and performance. But behind the equipment is you – the talent, the creator, the player, the gamer. Apply now to become a member of Team ROCCAT and feel the buff or level up of your gaming experience.

Program Tiers

Tier 3

  • Free headset

  • Free swag pack​

  • 20% off your purchases Tier 2

  • Full peripheral set

  • Free swag pack

  • Promotion on ROCCAT brand channels​

  • 20% off your purchases

  • Affiliate link w/ commissions Tier 1

  • Financial sponsorship

  • Full peripheral set​

  • Free swag pack

  • Promotion on ROCCAT brand channels

  • 20% off your purchases

  • Affiliate link with commission

  • Travel support​ Small streamers, apply! They are happy to review streamers of all sizes and look for people who’ve been creating content for more than 6 months.
